metadata.description: Agent-Driven Lifecycle — structured feature development with BDD specs, TDD, automated review, and verification gates.

plugins.name: adlc-solo
plugins.description: Agent-Driven Lifecycle — structured feature development with BDD specs, TDD implementation, automated review, and verification gates. Requires companion plugins: pr-review-toolkit, commit-commands.

plugins.name: adlc-team
plugins.description: Agentic Development Lifecycle v7.2 — Team edition. 3 role-based agents (BA/DEV/QA) with platform enforcement, 9 skills including weekly cost audit, GitHub Projects integration. v7.2: consolidated bash PreToolUse hook, 10-min spawn timeout + HUNG recovery, max 2 parallel dev-agents, mandatory Haiku routing, Opus advisor escalation, progressive-disclosure skills, async KNOWLEDGE harvest, PostToolUse compile-check.
